name: z/d wet dog food
description: food sensitivities and intolerance are potentially serious problems that can result in irritated skin, coat and ear conditions or even gastrointestinal upset. dogs that have adverse food reactions due to a food allergy (typically to a protein in the food) or intolerance, benefit from a food designed for food sensitivities. 고도로 가수분해된 동물성 단백질과 단일 탄수화물원 천연 섬유소 함유 임상적으로 입증된 항산화제
